title: Bango Bingo
description:
Bango Bingo takes the daubed card you already know and turns it into a deep, combo-driven roguelike. Every run, you draft a hand of charms that bend the rules, cards that reshape the board, and daubers that change how you mark - then you call balls, complete lines and patterns, and watch the score detonate. Can you beat all 8 nights? How high can your score get?

Chips x multiplier, line after line. Stack charms that feed each other, line up a Frame or a Blackout for a massive payout, and find the engine hiding in your deck. The best runs feel like the board is doing the work for you.

Balls you don't call are money. Overshoot the target for a bonus. Spend smart in the shop between blinds - on charms, daubers, vouchers, and consumables - then face a boss that breaks one of your favorite rules and dares you to adapt.

509 charms, 200 cards, 100 vouchers, 50 daubers, 50 consumables, and 50 bosses - across 6 patterns and 9 stakes of escalating difficulty - recombine into builds you'll be chasing for a long time. Many of those cards and charms unlock as you play.

A bingo hall soaked in late-night neon. Play a quick round or chase a deep endless run, after all, it scales to however much time you've got.

Features• A deckbuilder under the bingo. Draft charms, cards, daubers, vouchers, and consumables into an engine that's yours.

• Combo scoring with a high ceiling. Lines, patterns, multipliers - find the runs that snowball.

• Massive run-to-run variety. 509 charms, 200 cards, 100 vouchers, 50 daubers, 50 consumables, 6 patterns, 9 stakes, 50 bosses.

• Unlock as you go. Dozens of cards and charms open through play; an in-game Compendium documents everything.

• Bosses that change the rules. Each one forces a rethink.
description_short: You’ve never played Bingo like this before. Build a powerful deck of cards, charms, and daubers, chase wild scoring combos across patterns and lines, and push your run deeper every night. One more ball. One more boss. One more run.
